title: Anyone have plans for New Years this year
display_title: Anyone have plans for New Years this year
wikitext:
[]: Anyone have plans for New Years this year?             Quote Post by Ari » Mon May 18, 2015 10:47 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue May 19, 2015 1:34 am Not really got anything special planned but my Birthday is the 30th so I might see if I can do something vaguely Eva related. I am planning on cosplaying Shinji at a few events this year though.

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Tue May 19, 2015 7:31 am I remember doing a 2nd impact party on 13/09/2000 when I was in high school It's a shame there aren't more precise dates in the rest of the series... I guess it's supposed to start in August 2015, right?

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue May 19, 2015 9:36 am I believe so, as you said there isn't really anything more precise in the series. It'd be nice to see a proper timeline, so we can go from Shinji's arrival in Tokyo 3 to EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue May 19, 2015 9:38 am My plan is to not be tang.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue May 19, 2015 10:36 am Hah, talk about early planning! Then again, we should prepare ourselves, getting tanged is something to take seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by Ari » Tue May 19, 2015 3:00 pm robersora wrote: Hah, talk about early planning! Then again, we should prepare ourselves, getting tanged is something to take seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue May 19, 2015 3:36 pm robersora wrote: Hah, talk about early planning! Then again, we should prepare ourselves, getting tanged is something to take seriously.
